summary: Frontend testing complete for heading-up mode bug fix. All key fixes verified: 1) Heading-up toggle button works correctly, 2) Initial heading is calculated from route direction (not stuck at 0), 3) Speed gate lowered to 0.3 m/s, 4) Position-based heading calculation implemented, 5) Route-based heading fallback working, 6) smoothedHeadingRef initialized properly when toggling, 7) Heading wraparound handled correctly, 8) North-Up mode resets rotation to 0deg, 9) Compass rose reflects current heading, 10) Stop/yield signs use pure SVG with embedded text.

minor.issue: 504 Gateway Timeout when fetching traffic infrastructure - cosmetic only, does not affect core functionality

minor_issues.issue: Chart dimension warning 'width(-1) height(-1)' still occurs occasionally
minor_issues.note: Known issue from previous iterations - does not affect functionality

critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: NavigationView.tsx lines 278-316 - handleToggleNorthUp now calculates initial heading from GPS/position/route/smoothed, initializes smoothedHeadingRef
VERIFIED: NavigationView.tsx lines 3395-3430 - updateRotationAndPan lowered speed gate to 0.3 m/s, added position-based heading calculation
VERIFIED: NavigationView.tsx lines 3398-3410 - Position-based heading calculated from consecutive GPS positions using atan2
VERIFIED: NavigationView.tsx lines 3413-3426 - Route-based heading fallback uses first route segment bearing when no GPS heading
VERIFIED: NavigationView.tsx lines 3429-3434 - Heading smoothing uses exponential moving average with 0.15 factor and proper wraparound handling via ((diff+540)%360)-180
VERIFIED: TrafficIcon.tsx lines 28-40 - Stop and yield signs use pure SVG with embedded <text> elements (no lucide-react overlay)

features_tested.heading_up_toggle_button: PASS - Button exists with correct title attributes ('Switch to North Up' / 'Switch to Heading Up')
features_tested.initial_heading_calculation: PASS - When switching to Heading-Up, heading is calculated from route direction (not stuck at 0). Observed rotation: -13.55deg, -34.86deg
features_tested.speed_gate_lowered: PASS - Code verified: speed > 0.3 m/s threshold (down from 2 m/s)
features_tested.position_based_heading: PASS - Code verified: heading calculated from consecutive GPS positions using atan2
features_tested.route_based_heading_fallback: PASS - Code verified: uses first route segment bearing when no GPS heading available
features_tested.smoothedHeadingRef_initialization: PASS - Code verified: smoothedHeadingRef set to actual heading value when toggling to Heading-Up
features_tested.heading_wraparound: PASS - Code verified: ((diff+540)%360)-180 formula handles 350→10 correctly as +20
features_tested.north_up_reset: PASS - Map rotation resets to 0deg when switching to North-Up mode
features_tested.compass_rose: PASS - Compass rose present and reflects current heading mode
features_tested.stop_sign_icon: PASS - TrafficIcon uses pure SVG with embedded <text> element
features_tested.yield_sign_icon: PASS - TrafficIcon uses pure SVG with embedded <text> element
features_tested.route_calculation: PASS - Route to Chicago calculated (462.5 mi, 7h 14m)
features_tested.2d_3d_switching: PASS - Successfully switched between 2D and 3D views
features_tested.navigation_hud: PASS - Shows turn instructions, distance, time, ETA
features_tested.pois_along_route: PASS - Phillips 66, Pilot Flying J, etc. displayed

context_for_next_testing_agent: App at https://nav-emblem-display.preview.emergentagent.com. Bug fixes verified for heading-up mode: 1) Speed gate lowered from 2 m/s to 0.3 m/s in updateRotationAndPan (line 3430). 2) Position-based heading calculation added using atan2 from consecutive GPS positions (lines 3398-3410). 3) Route-based heading fallback uses first route segment bearing when no GPS heading (lines 3413-3426). 4) smoothedHeadingRef initialized with actual heading when toggling to Heading-Up (lines 309-312). 5) Heading wraparound handled correctly with ((diff+540)%360)-180 formula (line 3433). Key test flow: Guest login -> Navigation -> search 'Chicago' -> Route -> toggle heading-up button (NavIcon) -> verify map rotation changes. In preview environment without real GPS, heading is calculated from route direction.
